days.summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a real-time voice model focused on attentive listening, interference suppression, and more natural turn-taking, signaling continued competition in multimodal voice interfaces. OpenAI detailed how it operates Codex with sandboxing, approvals, network controls, and agent-native telemetry, offering a concrete blueprint for enterprise-safe coding agents. A reported DeepSeek financing of RMB 50 billion and a June target for DeepSeek V4.1 would be one of the largest China foundation-model financings if confirmed, but it remains single-source and unverified.
